channel.title: GitHub Haskell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Haskell in GitHub

item.title: PostgREST/postgrest
item.description: REST API for any Postgres database

item.title: jgm/pandoc
item.description: Universal markup converter

item.title: koalaman/shellcheck
item.description: ShellCheck, a static analysis tool for shell scripts

item.title: IntersectMBO/plutus
item.description: The Plutus language implementation and tools

item.title: IntersectMBO/cardano-node
item.description: The core component that is used to participate in a Cardano decentralised blockchain.

item.title: haskell/haskell-language-server
item.description: Official haskell ide support via language server (LSP). Successor of ghcide & haskell-ide-engine.

item.title: fossas/fossa-cli
item.description: Fast, portable and reliable dependency analysis for any codebase. Supports license & vulnerability scanning for large monoliths. Language-agnostic; integrates with 20+ build systems.

item.title: purescript/purescript
item.description: A strongly-typed language that compiles to JavaScript

item.title: augustss/MicroHs
item.description: Haskell implemented with combinators

item.title: kmonad/kmonad
item.description: An advanced keyboard manager

item.title: simplex-chat/simplexmq
item.description: ⚙️ SimpleXMQ - A reference implementation of the SimpleX Messaging Protocol for simplex queues over public networks.

item.title: haskell/cabal
item.description: Official upstream development repository for Cabal and cabal-install

item.title: runtimeverification/haskell-backend
item.description: The symbolic execution engine powering the K Framework

item.title: wireapp/wire-server
item.description: 🇪🇺 Wire back-end services

item.title: IntersectMBO/ouroboros-network
item.description: Specifications of network protocols and implementations of components running these protocols which support a family of Ouroboros Consesus protocols; the diffusion layer of the Cardano Node.

item.title: ucsd-progsys/liquidhaskell
item.description: Liquid Types For Haskell

item.title: nix-community/nix-vscode-extensions
item.description: Nix expressions for VSCode and OpenVSX extensions [maintainers: @deemp, @AmeerTaweel]

item.title: unisonweb/unison
item.description: A friendly programming language from the future

item.title: IntersectMBO/ouroboros-consensus
item.description: Implementation of a Consensus Layer for the Ouroboros family of protocols

item.title: anoma/juvix
item.description: A language for intent-centric and declarative decentralised applications
